further_reading.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a practical framework for thinking about AI risk, governance, and trustworthy use in real workflows.

further_reading.title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
further_reading.why_relevant: Introduces common safety and security failure modes for LLM-based systems, including data leakage and over-trust.

further_reading.title: OECD AI Principles
further_reading.why_relevant: Gives a beginner-friendly reference for trustworthy AI principles, including transparency, accountability, and safety.

notes: This module is primarily pedagogical and advisory. No hard factual claims requiring inline citation were identified under the seed rules.
